title: Format of email status notifications

posts.author: Bobobob (Bobobob)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m testing Monday to learn how to implement it for project management and control. I set up automation for an email denoting status. However, the status is run together with the task name and due date as follows.

Battery, Fluid LevelsOVERDUEJanuary 8 2022

How can I get Monday to insert the necessary spacing?

Thank you!

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bobobob!

Could you send some screenshots of the automation? That would give me a better idea of what you’re dealing with.

Thanks!
Tanner
tanner@elevateops.io
Monday.com Consultant

posts.author: Bobobob (Bobobob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Tanner for your prompt reply. I have provided the screenshots in a separate email.

Bob
